miniapp.name: YO DAWG
miniapp.subtitle: put a launcher in your launcher
miniapp.description: yo dawg, i heard you like launchers. spin up your own token launcher on Robinhood Chain — every token it launches pairs with $HOODIE, locked at the contract level. house rule. only rule.
miniapp.ogDescription: put a launcher launcher in your launcher. every pair is $HOODIE, proven on-chain.
